A large iceberg (B09B) grounded near the penguin habitat (Commonwealth Bay) in East Antarctica in December 2010. This forced the penguins to travel a long distance (more than 60 kilometers) to find food. 2. The Adelie penguin population in Cape Denison decreased from about 160,000 in February 2011 to about 10,000 by December 2013. The researchers note that the penguins were unable to breed successfully due to the long journey to find food. 3.
